title: The Marmalade Alibi
description: When the village fete's prize-winning preserve judge is found dead beside a toppled jam display, everyone agrees it was a dreadful accident. Everyone except Beatrice Mott, who knows that no one in Lower Tilbury would ever waste good marmalade. A cozy mystery where the clues are sweet and the motive is anything but.

chapters.title: A Recipe in the Wrong Hand
